name: xAI Grok API
pricing_notes: Grok-3: $3/M input tokens, $15/M output; Grok-3-mini: $0.30/M input, $0.50/M output

performance.notes: Grok-3 competitive with GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet on TTFT; real-time X data access unique advantage

agent_readiness.notes: OpenAI-compatible API — swap base_url to migrate. Live web search (especially X/Twitter data). Function calling supported. Tool use. Grok-3 reasoning model competitive on coding and math.

gotchas: No batch processing API (unlike OpenAI and Anthropic)
Rate limits less generous than OpenAI at scale
Privacy concerns for some users given Elon Musk/X Corp ownership
Ecosystem tooling and examples less mature than OpenAI/Anthropic
Real-time X data is powerful but X API terms complex
best_when: Need real-time X/Twitter data access for social intelligence agents
Grok-3's reasoning capability competitive alternative to GPT-4o or Claude Sonnet
avoid_when: Need batch processing for high-volume workloads
Enterprise environments with vendor risk concerns around X Corp
Need widest ecosystem support and examples
summary: xAI's Grok API offers OpenAI-compatible access to Grok-3 (strong reasoning, coding, math) and Grok-3-mini (cost-efficient). Unique differentiator: live access to X/Twitter data for real-time social intelligence. Easy migration from OpenAI via base_url swap. Lacks batch API and has smaller ecosystem than incumbents, but Grok-3 quality is genuinely competitive.
